mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.name, a.category_id, c.code as category_code, c.name as category_name, a.breed_id, b.code as breed_code, b.name as breed_name, a.description, a.first_found_time, a.location, a.is_adopted, a.status, ai.image_url FROM animals a LEFT JOIN animal_images ai ON a.id = ai.animal_id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN breed b ON a.breed_id = b.breed_id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS approved, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pending, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rejected, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_adopted = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS adopted, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_adopted = 0 OR is_adopted IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unAdopted FROM animals
mapper.insert:
insert into animals
name, category_id, breed_id, description, first_found_time, location, is_adopted, status,
#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{breedId}, #{description}, #{firstFoundTime}, #{location}, #{isAdopted}, #{status},
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM animals WHERE id IN
#{id}
